name: fp-minify
description: Comment-concision mode. Shapes the code the model writes so comments earn their place — a non-obvious why, or meaning a name can't hold (config, units, constraints) — and stay short; backstory goes to the commit. API docstrings are exempt. Sets a prior at the task edge; never steers mid-solve. Modes: off, new, tidy (default). Plus /fp-minify:strip for deliberate bulk de-commenting.
